name: Planet Shaped Wool Kids' Rug - Pillowfort™
description: Bring the magic of the cosmos to your kid's room with this Planet-Shaped Wool Kids' Rug from Pillowfort™. Made of 100% wool material with cotton backing, this tufted rug is designed in the shape of a planet with rings in shades of black, gray and yellow. Boasting handmade construction, this medium-pile rug is ideal for heavy traffic indoor areas. This space-themed rug is a beautiful and practical addition to their room.
